ValidationRule.description: Enforces Apex/Flow/Integration ownership for event types.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( TEXT(EventType__c) = "HIGH_VALUE_STATUS_REVIEW", TEXT(Source__c) <> "Flow" ), AND( TEXT(EventType__c) = "STATUS_CHANGED", TEXT(Source__c) <> "Apex" ), AND( TEXT(EventType__c) = "INTEGRATION_RESULT", AND( TEXT(Source__c) <> "Integration", TEXT(Source__c) <> "System" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Event type and Source are inconsistent with the designed automation ownership.
